name: Helpful as Homebrew
author: GrayPockets
bootlegger: Discrete Gossip optional rule is in effect.
Temperate Aslaahir optional rule is in effect.
Juggler Shortage optional rule is in effect.
Lil' Monsta Wrap optional rule is in effect.
Ceremonial God of Ug optional rule is in effect.

name: Gossip*
otherNightReminder: If the Gossip is due to kill a player, they die. :reminder:
ability: Each day, you may make a public statement. Tonight, if it was true, a player dies. Only three players may make a statement per day.
flavor: Blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah blah. Blah.

name: Alsaahir*
ability: Each day, if you publicly guess which players are Minion(s) and which are Demon(s), good wins. Only three players may guess per day.
flavor: I am here because of you, and you are here because of me.

name: Juggler*
ability: On your 1st day, publicly guess up to 5 players' characters. That night, you learn how many you got correct. Only three players may guess per day.
flavor: For my next trick, as per request, I will need a flower, a bag of beans, a toy snake, a paintbrush, and a motorized gasoline-powered hedge trimming device. I warn you, this trick may be my last. Oh dear.

name: Lil' Monsta*
firstNightReminder: Wake the Minions. They choose a player. :reminder: Put the Minions to sleep. Wake the target. Hand them the Lil' Monsta token.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Minions. They choose a player. :reminder: Put the Minions to sleep. Wake the target. Hand them the Lil' Monsta token. A player might die. :reminder:
ability: Each night, Minions choose who babysits Lil' Monsta & "is the Demon". Each night*, a player might die. [+1 Minion]
flavor: Step 1: Be cute. Step 2: World domination. Step 3: Bweakfast.

jinxes.reason: If the Hatter dies & the Demon chooses Lil' Monsta, they also choose a Minion to become.
If the Magician is alive, the Storyteller chooses which Minion babysits Lil' Monsta.
If Lil' Monsta & the Poppy Grower are alive, Minions wake one by one, until one of them chooses to take the Lil' Monsta token.
If the Psychopath is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.
If Lil' Monsta dies with 5 or more players alive, the Scarlet Woman babysits Lil' Monsta for the rest of the game.
If the Vizier is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.

name: God of Ug*
ability: One Ug hat. When wear Ug hat and time for vote, must speak one sound at a time but vote twice. If fail, pass Ug hat.
flavor: Blessed are my children, for they see the beauty in simple things.
